label: CTA Cards
description: Multiple call-to-action cards in a responsive row. Each card has icon/emoji, heading, description, and button. Use for service offerings, product categories. Layout: 2-4 cards with subtle borders and hover elevation.

sub_fields.label: Icon (Lucide icon name, e.g. rocket, shield, code, users)

cards.title: For Startups
cards.description: Launch fast with our startup-friendly tools. Get your site live in minutes with zero config.

cards.title: For Business
cards.description: Enterprise-grade features with the simplicity your team needs. Scale without limits.

cards.title: For Creators
cards.description: Beautiful themes and powerful content tools designed for writers, artists, and makers.
